app.name: Unity CLI Loop
app.one_liner: Your Unity project's AI autopilot. Compile, test, debug, repeat—until it just works.

screens.name: Unity Editor Integration
screens.purpose: Enable AI-driven control of Unity Editor operations including compilation, testing, scene manipulation, and UI inspection.

rust_commands.name: clear-console
rust_commands.purpose: Clear Unity console to maintain clean log state during autonomous loops.

rust_commands.name: compile
rust_commands.purpose: Trigger Unity project compilation from CLI for AI-driven build loops.

rust_commands.name: execute-dynamic-code
rust_commands.purpose: Run dynamically generated C# code in Unity Editor or PlayMode for flexible AI-driven modifications.

rust_commands.name: execute-menu-item
rust_commands.purpose: Invoke Unity Editor menu items programmatically to enable AI control over editor workflows.

rust_commands.name: get-logs
rust_commands.purpose: Fetch Unity console logs for AI analysis and debugging.

rust_commands.name: record-input
rust_commands.purpose: Record user input sequences for later replay in automated testing scenarios.

rust_commands.name: replay-input
rust_commands.purpose: Replay previously recorded input sequences to validate consistent game behavior.

rust_commands.name: run-tests
rust_commands.purpose: Execute Unity Test Runner via CLI to enable autonomous test validation.

rust_commands.name: screenshot
rust_commands.purpose: Capture Unity window screenshots for AI-based UI verification and layout refinement.

rust_commands.name: simulate-keyboard
rust_commands.purpose: Simulate keyboard input during PlayMode for comprehensive input automation.

rust_commands.name: simulate-mouse-input
rust_commands.purpose: Simulate raw mouse input in PlayMode for game interaction automation.

rust_commands.name: simulate-mouse-ui
rust_commands.purpose: Simulate mouse interactions with Unity UI elements during PlayMode for automated testing.

mvp_plan: week 1: Implement execute-menu-item and screenshot for basic editor control
week 1: Integrate core CLI commands: compile, run-tests, get-logs, clear-console
week 1: Set up PlayMode input simulation: mouse, keyboard, recording/replay
week 2: Add dynamic code execution capability for flexible AI interventions
week 2: Build session state tracking and project state persistence
week 2: Validate autonomous loop with sample Unity project
acceptance_tests: AI agent can trigger full compile-test-debug cycle without human intervention
PlayMode input simulation accurately reproduces recorded user interactions
Screenshot tool captures UI state for external AI analysis
System recovers from MCP server exit and stale port conflicts automatically
Unity Editor menu items can be invoked via CLI to perform scene operations
